## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Scope

- Area: (`feature` | `bugfix` | `refactor` | `infra` | `curriculum`)
- Related issue/ticket:

## Evidence

- Learner impact:
- Risk level: (`low` | `medium` | `high`)
- Rollback plan:

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run type-check`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `docker build --file Dockerfile --tag computelearn:pr .` (if Docker is available)

## Reviewer Checklist

- [ ] Scope is focused and intentional
- [ ] Validation evidence is included
- [ ] Documentation is updated when behavior changed
- [ ] Screenshots or terminal output attached for UI/UX changes
